note: seq=103 SUPERSEDED -> noop. The Socrata Batch-1 run errored (generic collector raised on the 41-dataset run) and rolled back, stalling the cursor and blocking seq-104 (the source-discovery HUNTER, priority). This noop advances the cursor so the hunter applies; the Socrata batch will be re-staged with per-dataset fail-soft so one bad dataset can't fail the whole run.

steps.note: seq=103 superseded; Socrata batch re-deployed later per-dataset fail-soft.
